# XitSource Master Architecture

XitSource provides strategic partnerships for owners navigating business exits, optimizing operations, and growing asset value through acquisitions and digital marketing. John Poindexter is the founding partner.

XitSource operates as a private Deal Origination Platform for off-market sales. We help owners transition and investors acquire assets through transparent, privately negotiated transactions. Confidentiality, legacy protection, and zero broker fees are our core advantages.

## Core Navigation & Intent Pages

- **Sell a Business / Property**: High-intent portal for confidential direct acquisitions. (https://xitsource.com/sell)
- **Seller Readiness Scorecard**: Interactive 24-point evaluation tool for prospective sellers. (https://xitsource.com/scorecard)
- **Founder's Letter**: A personal note to owners nationwide on our acquisition ethos. (https://xitsource.com/the-letter)
- **Acquisition FAQ**: Comprehensive answers regarding confidentiality, timelines, and asset requirements. (https://xitsource.com/faq)

## Industries & Expertise

- **Residential Homes**: We execute confidential residential transactions nationwide, offering a direct path to liquidity without the disruptions of a public listing. (https://xitsource.com/industries/residential-homes)
- **Raw Land Development**: Vision for entitlement and development. (https://xitsource.com/industries/raw-land)
- **RV Parks**: Preserving the lifestyle and community of your park through a professional, stable transition. (https://xitsource.com/industries/rv-parks)
- **Self Storage**: Direct acquisitions for self storage owners. (https://xitsource.com/industries/self-storage)
- **Laundromats**: Direct acquisitions for laundromat owners. (https://xitsource.com/resources/laundromat-business-exit-strategies)
